# `ai-tools` — ai-tools templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 2

Phishing simulation templates that impersonate AI productivity tools (Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot). Employees are increasingly targeted via fake AI-tool license suspension, unusual-activity, or subscription-expiration emails.

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Microsoft Copilot – License Suspended | [`copilot_license_suspended.html`](copilot_license_suspended.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |
| ChatGPT Plus – Payment Failed / Account Suspended | [`chatgpt_account_suspended.html`](chatgpt_account_suspended.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |

## Template details

### Microsoft Copilot – License Suspended

- **File:** [`copilot_license_suspended.html`](copilot_license_suspended.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/ai_tools_phishing_education.html`](education/ai_tools_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Your Microsoft 365 Copilot license has been suspended
  - Microsoft Copilot: Unusual activity detected — verify your account
  - Your Copilot access has been temporarily disabled
  - ACTION REQUIRED: Restore your Microsoft 365 Copilot license
- **Operator notes:** Highly effective against organizations using Microsoft 365. Copilot is now bundled in M365 E3/E5, meaning almost all enterprise employees have it. Fear of losing a productivity tool mid-task drives high click rates. The 48-hour deadline increases urgency. Works well as a follow-up after a general Microsoft 365 campaign.

### ChatGPT Plus – Payment Failed / Account Suspended

- **File:** [`chatgpt_account_suspended.html`](chatgpt_account_suspended.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/ai_tools_phishing_education.html`](education/ai_tools_phishing_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action required: Update your ChatGPT Plus payment method
  - Your ChatGPT Plus subscription has been suspended
  - Payment failed — your ChatGPT Plus account has been downgraded
  - ChatGPT Plus: Billing issue requires your attention
- **Operator notes:** Effective against any team where employees use ChatGPT Plus for productivity. The threat of losing access to GPT-4o and saved conversations creates urgency. Billing-failure lures are highly credible because subscription payment hiccups are a familiar everyday occurrence. Deploy to tech, marketing, legal, or any department with high ChatGPT usage.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
